archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) combined with Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) for a highly trusted, premium fintech aesthetic.
design_philosophy: A million-dollar VSL experience blending high-end cinematic dark mode with intense trust signals. Deep void blacks create a premium cinema-like viewing environment, while neon green acts as a focused kinetic trigger for the singular conversion goal. Uses 'Optical Clarity' glassmorphism for a modern fintech polish.

rules.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

spacing_and_layout.padding_strategy: Generous spacing. Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for section padding to allow breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode B (Control Room Grid) for Trust Stats and Testimonials to evoke an analytics dashboard feel.
spacing_and_layout.borders: Rounded borders premium (rounded-2xl to rounded-3xl for main containers). 1px solid subtle borders on all surfaces to prevent visual muddiness.

header.layout: Minimalist. Flex between logo (left) and social proof badge (right). Sticky at top z-50.

hero.style: Dark gradient radial background with noise texture overlay.
hero.layout: Centered alignment. Overline -> H1 Headline (High impact) -> Subtitle -> VSL Player -> Dynamic CTA.

vsl_player.style: Massive central element. Dark surface with 1px border_active and shadow-[0_0_60px_rgba(0,255,102,0.15)].
vsl_player.features: Uses local video vsl.mp4. Must have progress tracking logic. Auto-pause on scroll out of view (optional but recommended).

cta_button.style_unlocked: bg-[#00FF66] text-black font-bold shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,255,102,0.4)] hover:scale-105 hover:bg-[#00e65c] transition-all duration-300
cta_button.behavior: Locked until video reaches 60%. Shows 'ASSISTINDO VÍDEO...' and visual progress indicator while locked. Switches to 'CONSULTAR MEU POSSÍVEL REEMBOLSO' with pulsing glow when unlocked.

stats_bar.layout: Bento style mini-cards. Use large glowing numbers (text-4xl Outfit) with muted subtitles.

testimonials.style: ReclameAqui style, deep dark cards with 1px green border on hover.
testimonials.layout: Masonry or Bento grid. Use avatar, star ratings (5 green stars), and verified purchase badge.

faq.style: Minimalist accordion (Shadcn customized). Flat background, 1px border-border, active item gets subtle green glow.

motion_and_interactions.vsl_frame: Subtle breathing/pulsing shadow around the video frame using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.cta_reveal: When reaching 60%, trigger an attention-grabbing scale punch animation and color crossfade.
motion_and_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling via lenis (if possible) for premium cinematic feel.

logo.description: RecuperaPix logo (Neon green lightning on black)

hero_background.description: Abstract dark background with subtle green neon lines. Use with low opacity (10-20%) as a texture behind the hero.

vsl_video.description: Local video file for the VSL player.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'Outfit' font for all headings (H1-H4) and 'Inter' only for body text. DO NOT use Inter for headings.
Implement the VSL player with a standard HTML5 <video> tag, but attach React state to track 'currentTime' vs 'duration'.
The main CTA button must be disabled and visually locked until the video hits 60% completion. Show a small progress bar or percentage text inside the locked button.
Once 60% is reached, instantly transform the CTA to the neon green primary color, enable clicking, and add a pulsing animation (framer-motion or tailwind ping).
Use Lucide-react for UI icons (e.g., Locks, Shields, Checkmarks) matching the premium fintech vibe.
Apply 'data-testid' to all interactive elements as specified in the guidelines.
Ensure the hero background image is extremely subtle (opacity-10 to opacity-20) and uses a radial gradient mask to fade into the pure dark background at the edges.
Construct the stats and testimonials using Bento Grid Mode B (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) to give it a structured, data-driven feel.
